image.shortdescription: a quadrilateral whose sides are labeled ((1/4)*i), (i), ((4/3)*w), and (2*w).

solution.p: The perimeter is the result from adding the four sides together: 2w + {\frac{1}{4}}i + i + {\frac{4}{3}}w\text{.} There are two i-terms and two i-terms. We combine each pair of like terms and the perimeter is {\frac{10}{3}w+\frac{5}{4}i}\text{.}
